tif

Class TagValueConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • tif.TagValueConverter

  • public final class TagValueConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class for converting DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD values into human-readable or numeric forms. This class applies transformation rules based on TIFF field types and tag hints.
    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.2
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private static int ENCODING_HEADER_LENGTH  
      private static java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.nio.charset.Charset> ENCODING_MAP  
      private static logger.LogFactory LOGGER  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      private TagValueConverter()
      Default constructor will always throw an exception.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static boolean canConvertToInt(TifFieldType type)
      Checks if a TIFF field type can be losslessly converted to a 32-bit signed integer.
      private static java.lang.String decodeByteArray(Taggable tag, byte[] bytes)
      Decodes a raw byte array into a human-readable string based on the tag's hint.
      private static java.lang.String decodeString(Taggable tag, java.lang.String data)
      Decodes a string value.
      private static java.lang.String decodeUserComment(byte[] data)
      Decodes encoded strings containing an 8-byte charset identifier.
      static java.util.Date getDate(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Extracts a Date object from an entry if a date hint is present.
      static double[] getDoubleArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a double array.
      static double getDoubleValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a scalar double.

      Returns the value as a float array.
      static float getFloatValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a scalar float.
      static int[] getIntArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as an integer array.
      static int[] getIntArray2(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Deprecated. 
      static int getIntValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as an integer.
      static long[] getLongArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a long array.
      static long getLongValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a long.
      static RationalNumber[] getRationalArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as an array of RationalNumber objects.
      static RationalNumber getRationalValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a single RationalNumber instance.
      static java.time.ZonedDateTime getZonedDateTime(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Parses the entry data into a ZonedDateTime object.

      Validates and returns the entry data as a Number.

      Converts an DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry into a human-readable string.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TagValueConverter

        private TagValueConverter()
        Default constructor will always throw an exception.
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - to indicate that instantiation is not supported

    • Method Detail

      • canConvertToInt

        public static boolean canConvertToInt(TifFieldType type)
        Checks if a TIFF field type can be losslessly converted to a 32-bit signed integer.
        Parameters:
        type - the TIFF field type to evaluate
        Returns:
        true if the type is compatible with 32-bit signed integers

      • getIntValue

        public static int getIntValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as an integer.

        Note: It also explicitly handles unsigned promotion to prevent sign-extension bugs.

        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the integer value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the field type is incompatible with 32-bit integers or the data is not numeric

      • getIntArray

        public static int[] getIntArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as an integer array.

        This method provides resilient handling by returning direct int[] representations, promoting single Integer, Short, or Byte scalars to arrays, and performing unsigned promotion for 8-bit and 16-bit types.

        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        an array of integers, or an empty array if the data is incompatible
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry is null or does not contain compatible data

      • getLongValue

        public static long getLongValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a long.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the long value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the data is not numeric

      • getLongArray

        public static long[] getLongArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a long array. Since long is 64-bit, it safely holds all TIFF integer types (1, 3, 4, 6, 8, 9) as per TIFF specification 6.0.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        an array of longs, or an empty array if data is incompatible
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry is null or does not contain compatible data

      • getFloatValue

        public static float getFloatValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a scalar float.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the float value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the data is not numeric

      • getFloatArray

        public static float[] getFloatArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a float array.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the float array
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry is null or does not contain compatible data

      • getDoubleValue

        public static double getDoubleValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a scalar double.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the double value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the data is not numeric

      • getDoubleArray

        public static double[] getDoubleArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a double array. *

        It also acts as a "Bridge" between TIFF RationalNumber objects and Java primitives.

        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the double array, or an empty array if incompatible
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry is null or does not contain compatible data

      • getRationalValue

        public static RationalNumber getRationalValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as a single RationalNumber instance.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the RationalNumber instance
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry is null

      • getRationalArray

        public static RationalNumber[] getRationalArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Returns the value as an array of RationalNumber objects.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the rational array, or an empty array if not rational
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry is null or does not contain compatible data

      • toStringValue

        public static java.lang.String toStringValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Converts an DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry into a human-readable string.

        This method handles standard TIFF field types including Rationals, encoded byte arrays, and formatted hex tables for long arrays.

        Parameters:
        entry - the entry to format
        Returns:
        a formatted string representation of the entry data

      • getDate

        public static java.util.Date getDate(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Extracts a Date object from an entry if a date hint is present.
        Parameters:
        entry - the entry to parse
        Returns:
        a parsed Date object
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the hint is missing or the format is invalid

      • getZonedDateTime

        public static java.time.ZonedDateTime getZonedDateTime(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Parses the entry data into a ZonedDateTime object. This method supports ISO-8601 and various regional patterns via the SmartDateParser.
        Parameters:
        entry - the entry to parse
        Returns:
        a parsed ZonedDateTime object
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the entry does not contain a date hint or the format is invalid

      • toNumericValue

        private static java.lang.Number toNumericValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Validates and returns the entry data as a Number.
        Parameters:
        entry - the DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD to evaluate
        Returns:
        the data cast as a Number
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the data is not numeric

      • decodeString

        private static java.lang.String decodeString(Taggable tag,
                                             java.lang.String data)
        Decodes a string value. If the input matches a recognised date pattern, it returns the value as a formatted date string.
        Parameters:
        tag - the tag descriptor
        data - the raw string value to decode
        Returns:
        a decoded string, potentially formatted as a date

      • decodeByteArray

        private static java.lang.String decodeByteArray(Taggable tag,
                                                byte[] bytes)
        Decodes a raw byte array into a human-readable string based on the tag's hint.
        Parameters:
        tag - the tag descriptor
        bytes - the raw binary data
        Returns:
        a formatted string representation

      • decodeUserComment

        private static java.lang.String decodeUserComment(byte[] data)
        Decodes encoded strings containing an 8-byte charset identifier.
        Parameters:
        data - the raw byte array
        Returns:
        a decoded, trimmed string

      • getIntArray2

        @Deprecated
public static int[] getIntArray2(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
        Deprecated.
